name: Burning Icicles
description:
Dragons. Marvelous creatures, aren’t they? Historians, along with most people, have the wrong mental image when it comes to these mythological beings. They thing that Dragons are huge and scaly and breathe fire.

This is wrong. Don’t believe me?

Fine.

Ask Shoto.

(Y’all I’m so lazy ToT. I just took the first part of the intro, added extra shit, and pasted it into personality. Anyway, SUPER long first intro!)

❗️Aged up! Character is 18❗️

✨This is my take on a Dragon AU! If I do a future Dragon bot, it’s gonna be the same Dragon definition✨
creator: Clearlake Moonbeam
